news.headline: Market wrap: Stocks drop while bonds climb as economic data shows mixed signals.
Dow Jones falls 300 points due to hot Fed inflation gauge; Lululemon dips on earnings.
news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a 300-point decline due to a Fed inflation gauge that surpassed expectations. Additionally, Lululemon's stock took a significant plunge following their earnings report. This market news highlights the impact of economic indicators on stock performance.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: I'm hearing cautious optimism from businesses.
Fed's Daly: I have not changed her rate-path projection since last year, doesn't have enough info to make a change.
ECB's Muller: Trump tariffs could mean higher inflation.
Investor deadline nears for Fluence Energy investors. Losses over $75,000 between Nov 29, 2023, to Feb 10, 2025. Contact for options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Fluence to reach out to him for a consultation on their available options. If you experienced losses exceeding $75,000 in Fluence from November 29, 2023, to February 10, 2025, Wilson invites you to contact him directly to explore potential courses of action.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We need wait-and-see posture on monetary policy, give industries time to adjust to tariffs.
Fed's Daly: Two rate cuts still a reasonable projection for 2025.
Fed's Daly: Policy is in a good place, have to be patient to ensure inflation comes down.
Fed's Daly: we are making sure we are on sustainable path to 2% inflation is top of mind.
Fed's Daly: Growth and labor market remain solid.
Anaergia to supply anaerobic digestion system to City of Fermo, Italy with joint venture partner Edil Alta.
news.summary: Anaergia Inc., along with its subsidiary Anaergia S.r.l., and joint venture partner Edil Alta S.r.l, has been granted approval by the City of Fermo, Italy, to commence construction of a waste treatment plant. The project will include a new anaerobic digestion facility and is a collaboration with a leading Italian construction company. Once completed, the facility will be able to handle a larger quantity of waste for treatment. Anaergia's stock is listed on the TSX under the symbol ANRG and on the OTCQX as ANRGF.

news.headline: EU offers concessions to US for trade talks amid Trump's tariffs. 100 characters.

Bitcoin dips 3% on US PCE data, must hold $84K says analyst. BTC price hits lows under $84.5K before reversing. Inflation quickens, anticipates possible stagflation by 2025. Experts warn of market cooldown and potential drop to $78-80K before bounce back. Trend remains bullish but concerns arise.
news.summary: Bitcoin faced volatility on March 28, dropping over 3% to lows under $84,500, the lowest since March 23. The US Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) Index showed increased inflation with a 0.3% month-on-month and 2.5% year-on-year rise. BTC price analysis indicated a "typical market cooldown" despite the inflation warning, with traders cautious about the market's strength. Some believed BTC could see a test at $78-80K before bouncing back up, with doubts lingering about a sustained bull run. The broader outlook indicated a potential seasonal reset, aligning with a familiar market dynamic of "sell in May and go away." BTC's short-term price action suggested localized pressure, but a full bullish comeback seemed unlikely on short timeframes. Bitcoin held above $80,000 for weeks but remained in a shaky position.

news.headline: Ascent Solar delivers space-worthy PV blankets to European space provider in record 2 weeks. Launch set for later in 2025.
news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado, on March 28, 2025, Ascent Solar Technologies (Nasdaq: ASTI), a key figure in the U.S. in featherweight, flexible thin-film photovoltaic solutions, revealed the supplying of spaceflight-ready PV blankets to a major European space systems provider. These cutting-edge blankets aim to enhance spacecraft efficiency by reducing weight and boosting power. They are slated for a space mission later in 2025.

news.headline: Investor claims in Maravai LifeSciences are being investigated for losses over $50,000. Contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for options.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Maravai LifeSciences to reach out directly to him for a discussion on their available options. If you are among those who suffered losses exceeding $50,000 in Maravai LifeSciences since August 7, you are encouraged to connect with James Wilson to explore your potential courses of action.

news.headline: Investors of Geron urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if losses exceed $100,000. Deadline soon.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Geron between February 28, 2024, and February 25, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If your losses meet or exceed this threshold in Geron during the specified period, Wilson is available for consultation.

Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 44/100 = Fear
Global game engines market expected to grow at 11.8% CAGR. Valued at USD 1257 million in 2024. 3D, 2.5D, & 2D engines in demand.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of March 28, 2025, the Game Engines Market is categorized into three types: 3D Game Engines, 2.5D Game Engines, and 2D Game Engines. It is further divided by application into Computer Games and Mobile Games. The worldwide market for Game Engines reached a value of USD 1257 million in the year 2024.

news.headline: Polymer Additive Manufacturing market to hit $36.19B by 2031, with 15.1% CAGR growth from 2024, driven by demand for lightweight materials and 3D printing technologies.
news.summary: The growth of the market is fueled by increasing interest in lightweight materials and advancements in 3D printing technologies. In Redding, California, as of March 28, 2025, a recent report titled 'Polymer Additive Manufacturing Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis' highlights this trend. The report explores the expanding market, indicating a strong demand for these materials. It reveals significant numbers in market size, share, and forecasts, underscoring the impact of technological progress on the industry.

news.headline: MarTech market to surge to $296.88B by 2030 from $175.95B in 2025, with 11.0% CAGR - MarketsandMarkets report.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects significant growth in the MarTech Market, foreseeing an increase from USD 175.95 billion in 2025 to USD 296.88 billion by 2030. This expansion represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.0% during the forecast period of 2025–2030. The report offers a detailed look at the market with 300 tables included in the in-depth table of contents for the "MarTech Market."

news.headline: Inventor from Paterson, N.J. develops R K P DEVICE to separate refrigerator from freezer for easier movement.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, an inventor from Paterson, New Jersey, shared the inspiration behind creating the R K P DEVICE, aimed at separating a refrigerator from a freezer for ease of carrying and moving. The inventor explained the need for better maneuverability for the two units and expressed how the new design would facilitate transporting the appliance.

news.headline: Fear and Greed Index: 24/100 = Extreme Fear
ECB's Nagel: We still shouldn't get overly optimistic on inflation.
$6M exploit on Hyperliquid leads to delisting of Jelly token (JELLY) due to a short squeeze incident. Critics slam exchange's handling.
news.summary: Decentralized exchange Hyperliquid delisted the Jelly-my-Jelly (JELLY) memecoin due to suspicious trading activity and an exploit that unfolded over a few days. The JELLY token price crashed from $0.21 to $0.01 within 10 days of its launch, with its market cap dropping to $25 million from almost a quarter of a billion dollars. The exploit involved a whale depositing $7 million into Hyperliquid, making leveraged trades on the illiquid token, resulting in a short squeeze where $6.26 million was withdrawn, leaving a balance of approximately $900,000. Hyperliquid faced criticism for its handling of the situation, with observers highlighting the risks and lack of oversight in the DeFi sector. The exploit ultimately led to losses for the exchange, traders, and the exploiter. The incident raised concerns about the sustainability of hype-driven projects in DeFi and underscored the need for better regulations and oversight in the industry.

Cytogenetics market to hit $5.5B by 2031, growing at 9.6% CAGR from 2024. Advancements in genetic testing driving growth.
news.summary: Rapid expansion in the market is being propelled by progress in genetic testing and increasing interest in personalized medicine. Released on March 28, 2025, a fresh market analysis report titled 'Cytogenetics Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis' indicates significant growth. The report delves into various aspects including product analysis of instruments with impressive insights. The impact of these advancements is highlighted by key metrics such as market size and share, reflecting the upward trajectory. This shift is driven by a surge in demand for personalized medicine, showcasing a trend that is expected to continue its upward trajectory.

news.headline: Research on ISS aims to develop regenerative therapies to reverse heart damage on Earth.
news.summary: Research supported by the ISS National Lab is hastening the progress of regenerative treatments that may potentially reverse heart damage. Find out more in the most recent release of Upward magazine. Taking place at Kennedy Space Center in Florida, as of March 28, 2025, heart disease continues to be the primary cause of...

news.headline: Debut novel blends YA fantasy with Nepalese spirituality, launching globally on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: The first book in the A Journey to the Heart of Kumari trilogy introduces readers to a captivating family saga set against the backdrop of Himalayan scenery, featuring enigmatic mysteries and profound destinies. Located in Manhattan, New York, the novel made its debut on March 28, 2025. The Young Adult fantasy narrative blends ancient traditions with a touch of divinity, offering a unique journey for readers to immerse themselves in.

news.headline: Verdek LLC starting final phase of EV charging facility construction in Bronx's Municipal Parking Lot on White Plains Rd.
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut, on March 28, 2025, Verdek LLC revealed their plans for a cutting-edge EV charging project in the Municipal Parking Lot on White Plains Rd in Bronx, NY. This initiative is part of New York City's efforts to embrace electric vehicles and reduce carbon emissions. The project aims to install modern charging infrastructure to cater to the city's increasing demand for electric vehicles.
